title: Appa Tucker Lyrics Inga Enna Solludhu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Appa Tucker
Singer(s): Psycho Unit
Lyricist: Psycho Unit (Malaysia)
Movie: Inga Enna Solludhu
Music: Dharan Kumar

Moodu engalukku ellaam theriyum.
Appa Tucker ..Appa Tucker..
BP maama.. drop it ya ..

Naanthaan da appa tucker-u
naan thotta neeyum tucker-u
emmaadiyo pikkiyum tucker-u
song-oda yen moodu tucker-u

Naanthaan da appa tucker-u
naan thotta neeyum tucker-u
emmaadiyo pikkiyum tucker-u
song-oda yen moodu tucker-u

Vingyanam saamar vedhamellaam
arindhavan naanada..
pathaam class padikkaama
deal vittavan naanada .

Life-ula rendu perthaan tucker-u
adhula onnu bodha liquor-u
musickuna tucko tuckeru..
tyre-a paartha maams-u panjaru.. (2)

They call me komaali
naalum therinja poochaandi
matterla killaadi..

Adiye singaari
what is our name-u ?
you know me ...
top tucker game-u

Life-la vidha vidha tucker-u
adhula bodha I mean liquor-u
music come up the tucker-u
sathiyama paatha ivaru panjaru..

Love-ula nee jaichaa tucker-u
adhula ne thorthalum tucker-u
I dont care .always upper-u
oorla naanthaan appa tucker-u

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Appa Tucker?

The song Appa Tucker is a lively and energetic track that celebrates fun and enjoyment, capturing the essence of partying.

What is the context of this song in the movie Inga Enna Solludhu?

In Inga Enna Solludhu, this song is featured during a vibrant party scene, enhancing the celebratory mood of the film.

Who are the artists behind the song?

The song is performed by the Psycho Unit, who also wrote the lyrics, with music composed by Dharan Kumar.

When was Appa Tucker released?

Appa Tucker was released on December 8, 2013, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Appa Tucker is an upbeat and energetic song that perfectly encapsulates the spirit of celebration and fun in the movie Inga Enna Solludhu. The lively beats and catchy lyrics invite listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. This track conveys a sense of joy and excitement, making it ideal for parties and celebrations. The vibrant energy of the song evokes feelings of happiness and enthusiasm, ensuring it resonates with audiences looking for a good time.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove to the infectious beats of Appa Tucker from the movie Inga Enna Solludhu. This track, brought to life by the dynamic Psycho Unit and the talented music director Dharan Kumar, is a perfect blend of energy and fun. With its catchy lyrics and vibrant vibe, this song is sure to get you moving!
stanzaMeanings: We know everything about the mood. Appa Tucker.. Appa Tucker.. BP uncle.. drop it ya..
I am the Appa Tucker, you are also a Tucker, the song's mood is also a Tucker.
I am the Appa Tucker, you are also a Tucker, the song's mood is also a Tucker.
I am the one who knows all the sciences and scriptures.. I am the one who skipped class and made a deal.
In life, there are two types of Tucker, one of them is liquor, when music plays, it's Tucker.. looking at the tyre, uncle, it's a panjaru..
They call me a joker, but I know the matter well..
Hey darling, what is our name? You know me... top Tucker game..
In life, there are various Tuckers, one of them is liquor, music comes up, truly looking at this, it's a panjaru..
If you win in love, it's Tucker, even if you lose, it's Tucker, I don't care. Always upper, in the town, I am the Appa Tucker..
